{{Quote|Even when fighting the great sabercat, it is best not to turn your back upon the lowly serpent.|Old [[Sith/Legends|Sithian]] proverb|<ref name="Shadows of the Empire (novel)">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]</ref>}}
The '''saber cat''', or '''sabercat''', was a huge, [[Feline/Legends|feline]], carnivorous [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Monastery/Legends|Monastery]]. They were predators with a thick horn which protruded from the top of the skull.<ref name="The Unknown Regions" /> The saber cat had four huge paws, each with five razor-sharp claws. Their [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] were also razor-sharp.
[[File:SaberCat-MSW36.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A saber cat attacks Luke Skywalker]]

In their years on Monastery, the members of the [[Order of the Sacred Circle]] had tamed several saber cats, and kept them as pets.

The whelps brought a high price on the black market, and they were often pets and status symbols for crimelords and nobles.

When [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] accompanied [[Domina Tagge/Legends|Domina Tagge]] back to Monastery on a diplomatic mission, he saved her from a seeming-saber cat. In truth, [[Domina Tagge/Legends|Domina Tagge]] manipulated the creature, (as she had done earlier with a [[nightshrike]]).

==Behind the scenes==
The saber cat was created by [[Archie Goodwin]] and [[Carmine Infantino]].
